SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBTS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2008 - JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT SHALL RETAIN POSSESSION OF FOUR TABLE TOPS; PLAINTIFF SHALL RETAIN OWNERSHIP AND POSSESSION OF THE REMAINING TABLE TOP AND ANY OTHER MATERIALS RELATED TO THE ORIGINAL ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRECO GRANITE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, RIC $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $80.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RETAIN POSSESSION OF FOUR TABLE TOPS; PLAINTIFF SHALL RETAIN OWNERSHIP AND POSSESSION OF THE REMAINING TABLE TOP AND ANY OTHER MATERIALS RELATED TO THE ORIGINAL ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LOPEZ, RIC RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT GRECO GRANITE $1,465.25 PRINCIPAL, $56.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,521.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
